title: More than 20 boards connected

posts.author: Deep.MondayExp (Deepak)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Monday folks,

I’m following a high-level, low-level board project structure where any new item created in the low-level board is copied to the high-level board through automation and connected.

However, I’ve noticed that even after connecting numerous items in the high-level board, exceeding the 20-board limit for the Pro plan on Monday.com, it still seems to be functioning without any warning.

Please see the attached screenshot for reference. Can someone clarify this behavior for me? How is the high-level board connected to more than 20 boards and still working fine?

image754×544 36.6 KB

posts.author: Bobby.Trick (Bobby Trick)
posts.cookedHtml: I was experiencing this as well. Then I went to add my 27th board from a template and was finally met with the limit.
